settings.heading: About Us
settings.body: Bikini Booth is a swimwear and resortwear brand designed in Thailand, inspired by sun, sea, and endless escapes. These Terms & Conditions govern your use of our website and purchase of our products.

settings.heading: Our Products
settings.body: We strive to display products and colours as accurately as possible. Minor variations may occur due to photography, screen settings, or manufacturing. Product descriptions and prices are subject to change without notice.

settings.heading: Pricing & Payments
settings.body: All prices are shown in the currency selected at checkout unless stated otherwise. Payment must be received in full before orders are dispatched. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel orders in cases of pricing errors or suspected fraud.

settings.heading: Orders
settings.body: Placing an order constitutes an offer to purchase. We will confirm acceptance by sending an order confirmation email. We may decline orders due to stock availability, errors, or other legitimate reasons.

settings.heading: Shipping
settings.body: Shipping terms, costs, and delivery estimates are described on our Shipping & Returns page. Risk of loss passes to you upon delivery to the carrier unless otherwise required by law.

settings.heading: Returns & Exchanges
settings.body: Returns and exchanges are subject to our returns policy. Items must be unworn, unwashed, and in original condition with tags and hygiene liners attached. Sale items may be final sale.

settings.heading: In-Store Purchases
settings.body: Purchases made in our physical stores are subject to these terms where applicable, along with any in-store policies communicated at the time of purchase.

settings.heading: Intellectual Property
settings.body: All content on this website — including logos, images, text, and designs — is owned by or licensed to Bikini Booth and protected by intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce or use our content without permission.

settings.heading: Liability
settings.body: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Bikini Booth is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from use of our website or products. Our liability is limited to the amount you paid for the relevant product or service.

settings.heading: Use of Our Website
settings.body: You agree not to misuse our website, attempt unauthorised access, interfere with security, or use our services for unlawful purposes. We may suspend access if these terms are violated.

settings.heading: Privacy
settings.body: Your use of our website is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which explains how we collect and use personal information.

settings.heading: Governing Law
settings.body: These terms are governed by the laws of Thailand, without regard to conflict of law principles. Disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Thailand, unless mandatory consumer laws provide otherwise.

settings.heading: Updates to These Terms
settings.body: We may revise these Terms & Conditions at any time. Updated terms will be posted on this page with a revised date. Continued use of the website after changes constitutes acceptance.

settings.heading: Contact Us
settings.body: Questions about these terms? Please contact us and we will be happy to help.

settings.hero_intro: Welcome to Bikini Booth. These Terms & Conditions set out the rules for using our website and purchasing our products. Please read them carefully.
settings.main_lead: By accessing our website or placing an order with us, you agree to the terms below. Please read them carefully.
